title: verbascum drymophilum
intro: Verbascum drymophilum, also known as the mountain mullein, is a species of flowering plant in the mullein genus. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Verbascum drymophilum include soothing sore throats, calming irritated skin, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of this plant are often infused in teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
